name: Beri
short: One Piece-themed economy system with Beri currency.
description: A full economy cog featuring wallet management, leaderboard, coinflip, slots, and a full audit log. Runs alongside Red's built-in economy with its own separate balance.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs and Beri balances, as well as transaction history including actor, reason, delta, and timestamp.
author: UltPanda
install_msg: Thanks for installing Beri! Use `[p]beriset info` to check your config and `[p]beriset auditchannel #channel` to enable live audit logs.
